heading: Access to certain facilities of United States Government for assessment of anomalous health conditions
label: 3334j Access to certain facilities of United States Government for assessment of anomalous health conditions
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “intelligence community” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. X of Pub. L. 117–103section 3003 of this title

children.heading: Assessment
children.label: a Assessment
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall ensure that the elements of the intelligence community provide to individuals described in subsection (c) who are experiencing symptoms of anomalous health conditions timely access for medical assessment to facilities of the United States Government with expertise in traumatic brain injury.

children.heading: Process for assessment and treatment
children.label: b Process for assessment and treatment
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Director of National Intelligence shall coordinate with the Secretary of Defense and the heads of such Federal agencies as the Director considers appropriate to ensure that, by not later than 60 days after , there is a process to provide the individuals described in subsection (c) with timely access to the National Intrepid Center of Excellence, an Intrepid Spirit Center, or an appropriate medical treatment facility for assessment as described in subsection (a) and, if necessary, treatment.March 15, 2022

children.heading: Individuals described
children.label: c Individuals described
children.text: The individuals described in this subsection are employees of elements of the intelligence community and the dependents or other immediate family members of such employees.
